---
title: "test_ui_integration_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_ui_integration_empire.ts"
loc: 17
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.77
style_score: 9.20
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 9.27
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [execa](file://execa)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `CSTAR_PATH`
- `execa`
